rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Implementation contracts should use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports belong in valid component type scopes
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Component names, ports, and connections are defined in the input AADL model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require valid subcomponent and connection context
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
